html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
Faceless Pumpkin is a craftable item. The recipe is available from start during Hallowed Nights event. It spoils after 8 days. Player can wax it with Beeswax to stop it from spoiling.

Player can use Pumpkin Carving Tools to carve it and turn it into Pumpkin Head. The resulting Pumpkin Head retains the same spoilage state as the original Faceless Pumpkin. If the Faceless Pumpkin was waxed prior to carving, the resulting Pumpkin Head will also remain waxed.

Contents

  • 1 Pumpkin Head
  • 2 Carving
  • 3 Skins
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Pumpkin Head

Pumpkin Head is an item that can be equipped on head. Player can get it after using Pumpkin Carving Tools to decorate Faceless Pumpkin. Player can use Pumpkin Carving Tools to edit the carving of it. Player can wax it with Beeswax to stop it from spoiling.

During the dusk and night, Pumpkin Head emits a small light from carved parts that does not save player from darkness. Wearing Pumpkin Head will prevent player from losing Sanity from dusk, night, Ghost, Bigspook, Pipspook and Spooks. Wearing it can also negates both the vision loss and slowdown from Sandstorm and Moonstorm.

Carving

To start carving, hold a Pumpkin Carving Tools and click on a Faceless Pumpkin or Pumpkin Head. This opens a canvas (UI) with pumpkin and various decorating elements. Players can select different shapes for left eye, right eye and mouth. All 3 parts always have static positions. Each Pumpkin Carving Tools in player's inventory gives 9 different decoration variants for each of 3 parts.

A randomization option is also available, applying random decoration variants from the set of currently available options.

Varinaats
Tools "Eye" "Other Eye" "Mouth"

Pumpkin Scooper







Pumpkin Knife







Pumpkin Saw






Skins

These skins work for both Pumpkin Head and Faceless Pumpkin. They do not appear in skins collection.

  • The Complimentary Ghoulish Green and Complimentary Gourd-geous are available to all players initially.
Complimentary
Ghoulish Green
Complimentary
Gourd-geous

title: Faceless Pumpkin
wikitext:
{{Object Infobox |image = Faceless Pumpkin Dropped.png |icon = Faceless Pumpkin.png |description = It's only natural to wear a pumpkin on your head after you've carved a face into it. |ingredient1 = Pumpkin |multiplier1 = 1 |filter = {{Pic32|Clothing Filter}} |tier = 0 |stack = Does Not Stack |spoil = 8 days |spawnCode = "pumpkinhat" }} {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Event|Hallowed Nights}} '''Faceless Pumpkin''' is a craftable item. The recipe is available from start during [[Hallowed Nights]] event. It spoils after 8 days. Player can wax it with [[Beeswax]] to stop it from spoiling. Player can use [[Pumpkin Carving Tools]] to carve it and turn it into '''Pumpkin Head'''. The resulting Pumpkin Head retains the same spoilage state as the original Faceless Pumpkin. If the Faceless Pumpkin was waxed prior to carving, the resulting Pumpkin Head will also remain waxed. __TOC__ {{Clear}} ==Pumpkin Head== {{Object Infobox |image = Pumpkin Head Dropped.png |icon = Pumpkin Head.png |stack = Does Not Stack |name = Pumpkin Head |waterResistance = 20% resistance |equipslot=head |spoil = 8 days |spawnCode = "pumpkinhat_carved" }} '''Pumpkin Head''' is an item that can be equipped on head. Player can get it after using [[Pumpkin Carving Tools]] to decorate '''Faceless Pumpkin'''. Player can use Pumpkin Carving Tools to edit the carving of it. Player can wax it with [[Beeswax]] to stop it from spoiling. During the dusk and night, Pumpkin Head emits a small light from carved parts that does not save player from [[darkness]]. Wearing Pumpkin Head will prevent player from losing [[Sanity]] from dusk, night, [[Ghost]], [[Bigspook]], [[Pipspook]] and [[Spooks]]. Wearing it can also negates both the vision loss and slowdown from [[Sandstorm]] and [[Moonstorm]]. {{Clear}} ==Carving== To start carving, hold a [[Pumpkin Carving Tools]] and click on a '''Faceless Pumpkin''' or '''Pumpkin Head'''. This opens a canvas (UI) with pumpkin and various decorating elements. Players can select different shapes for left eye, right eye and mouth. All 3 parts always have static positions. Each Pumpkin Carving Tools in player's inventory gives 9 different decoration variants for each of 3 parts. A randomization option is also available, applying random decoration variants from the set of currently available options. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |+Varinaats !Tools !"Eye" !"Other Eye" !"Mouth" |- |{{pic|32|Pumpkin Scooper}}
